ns0:entry.ns0:title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kilo-Org/kilocode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode
Language: typescript
Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kong/insomnia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kong/insomnia
Language: typescript
The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: labring/FastGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/labring/FastGPT
Language: typescript
FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: likec4/likec4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/likec4/likec4
Language: typescript
Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.
